title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at Devyani International Holdings Services - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at Devyani International Holdings Services - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Devyani International Holdings Services is actively seeking a talented and motivated Reservation Manager to join our dynamic team in Hyderabad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Devyani International Holdings Services:
Devyani International Holdings Services is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in Crisis Management
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in Travel Management
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills
• Proficiency in GDS Systems
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in F&B Service

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Devyani International Holdings Services!
